I wouldn't necessarily start with it unless what you really really want in life is to understand low-level details.

JavaScript is the best language to start with for 95% of people.

Learn C if you want to deeply understand what is happening under the hood at the lowest level of modern optimization that makes sense.

Learn JavaScript if you want to be able to build stuff quickly that works everywhere.

Learn Python when you get frustrated with JavaScript.
